title: Attestplane Auditor Export (v1)
description: Auditor-friendly summary of a proof bundle. Optimised for human review by a regulator, an external auditor, or counsel. Strictly a subset of proof_bundle.schema.json — anything an auditor needs to assess chain integrity and framework coverage without reading every event. Locked by the claim-safety triad and ADR-0008. Concrete events are NOT included here; this shape only carries summary metadata + chain integrity + framework coverage. Reviewers who need event-level access read the full proof bundle separately.

export_version.description: Frozen at 1. Bump requires a new schema_version + ADR.

event_type_histogram.description: Map from event_type string to occurrence count. Keys SHOULD be members of ALL_EVENT_TYPES_V1; unknown keys are tolerated (future-taxonomy compat).

anchor_status.description: v1 only emits 'unanchored'; 'quarantine' is the explicit claim-safe terminal state for TSA timeout / malformed / chain-mismatch failures.

framework_coverage.description: Per-framework rollup of obligation coverage. Each entry summarises which obligations of a given framework + article have evidence in the underlying chain. The summary deliberately omits event-level detail so the auditor can see breadth without reading payloads.

framework.description: Framework name as listed in the registry, e.g., 'EU AI Act', 'DORA'.

obligation_ids_without_evidence.description: Obligations from the registry for which no evidence event was found in the underlying chain. Surfacing the absence is a feature: a regulator needs to see what is missing, not only what is present.

forbidden_fields.description: Echo of the producing bundle's forbidden_fields list. MUST equal the corresponding proof_bundle.forbidden_fields.

redaction_status.description: Mechanism that produced the redaction. 'enforced_by_adapter' = the runtime adapter dropped forbidden fields at translation time; 'enforced_by_producer' = a downstream filter removed them; 'unenforced' = no redaction mechanism was active (verifier MUST flag this as a warning).

consent_status.description: GDPR Art. 6 consent posture for any subject-linked events in the underlying chain, when applicable. 'consent_not_applicable' is the right value when the chain has no SubjectRef-bearing events or when consent is not the lawful basis (e.g., legal obligation under Art. 6(1)(c)).

legal_disclaimer.description: Plain-language statement that this export is a technical summary and not a compliance opinion. Recommended default text: 'This export is a technical chain-integrity and framework-coverage summary. It is not a compliance opinion. Consult qualified counsel for any regulatory determination.'
legal_disclaimer.default: This export is a technical chain-integrity and framework-coverage summary. It is not a compliance opinion. Consult qualified counsel for any regulatory determination.

signature.description: Optional Sigstore signature over the canonical-JSON of the export. Ships at M6.
